variants.title: Filtrec RHR330N03V3/AB1 Return Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHR330N03V3/AB1. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHR330N03V3/AB1 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Cellulose, Outer Diameter: 94.5 mm, Inner Diameter: 48.2 mm, Length: 194.0 mm, Media Type: Cellulose
